institution.name: Texas Tech University Health Sciences Center

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Texas Tech University Health Sciences Center rose 14% between 2006 and 2009 ($10.5k → $12.0k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Texas Tech University Health Sciences Center rose 91% between 1999 and 2002 (33.3% → 63.6%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Texas Tech University Health Sciences Center are 70% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($92.3k vs $54.5k).
